saliency_strings: {"From: Sarah Jenkins, Bigstock <welcome@Bigstock.com>": "Identifies the sender as a legitimate company sending a welcome message.", "Subject: Welcome to Bigstock": "Indicates the email is a welcome and informational message.", "I wanted to take a moment to personally welcome you to our platform": "Confirms the email's purpose as a welcome to the service.", "You are receiving this email because you recently registered an account with Bigstock.": "Explains the reason for the email, confirming it's an expected informational message with no immediate action required."}

author: llm
saliency_strings: {"URGENT: Executive Directive - Portal Migration": "Uses urgent language and implies a mandatory directive to pressure the recipient.", "all employees must immediately validate their single sign-on credentials in the new system.": "Demands immediate action to provide login credentials, a common phishing tactic.", "your workstation access isn't automatically revoked tonight.": "Threatens immediate negative consequences to create fear and urgency.", "https://companynetwork.com/auth/verify [-> http://www.companynetwork.authorization.com/login]": "The displayed link text is deceptive, as the actual hyperlink points to a different, suspicious domain ('companynetwork.authorization.com') and uses insecure HTTP, indicating a phishing attempt.", "Failure to comply with this IT Security Team directive by 5:00 PM will result in an immediate network lockout.": "Reinforces the threat of account lockout with a tight deadline, a strong indicator of phishing."}

author: llm
saliency_strings: {"Official Notice: Mandatory Directory Verification Required": "Uses urgent language to pressure the recipient, a common phishing tactic.", "a few of your former classmates have recently tagged you in archived graduation photos. To view these memories, reconnect with familiar faces, and secure your alumni credentials, you must download and open the attached directory update file today.": "Uses social engineering (photos, reconnecting with friends) to entice the recipient to download a file.", "Download Directory Update & Photos [-> http://www.<alumni.relations.classmates.alumni.com/Alumni_Directory_Update.zip]": "The hyperlink's domain is malformed and highly suspicious ('<alumni.relations.classmates.alumni.com' instead of 'classmates.com'), and it points to a '.zip' file, which is often used for malware distribution. It also uses HTTP instead of HTTPS.", "Action Required: Failure to comply with this official security request within 24 hours will result in the permanent deletion of your directory record and the immediate revocation of your university email forwarding privileges.": "Threatens severe negative consequences with a tight deadline, a strong indicator of a phishing attempt."}

author: human
saliency_strings: {"From: Central State IT <student-services@indiana.edu>": "While the sender's domain appears legitimate, the email's content and fraudulent links indicate a spoofing attempt.", "Subject: URGENT: Mandatory Password Reset Due To Security Breach": "Uses 'URGENT' and claims a security breach to create panic and pressure, a common phishing tactic.", "We are writing to inform you of a recent security incident that may have compromised student accounts.": "A common pretext used in phishing to trick users into providing credentials due to a supposed breach.", "Update Password [-> http://univ.indie.ana.com]": "The hyperlink's domain 'univ.indie.ana.com' is clearly not the official university domain, indicating a fraudulent link."}

author: human
saliency_strings: {"From: Mike Smith <m.smith@invites.com>": "Identifies the sender as an invitation service.", "Subject: Annual Winter Gala - RSVP": "Clearly states the purpose of the email as an invitation to an event.", "We want to get a final count of who will be attending, so we need you to register for your (free) tickets.": "Explains the reason for the request and the action needed.", "Click here to register [-> http://invitees.com]": "Provides a clear call to action with a legitimate-looking link to register for the event."}

author: human
saliency_strings: {"From: Alison Cabrera, Esq. <alison.cabrera@lawandidentitytheft.com>": "Identifies the sender as a legitimate legal professional from a relevant firm.", "Subject: Legal Advisory: Identity Theft Prevention Awareness": "Indicates the email is an official advisory on an important topic.", "please visit our webpage [-> http://www.lawandidentitytheft.com/info/]": "Directs the recipient to a webpage for more information.", "Access Identity Theft Resources [-> http://www.lawandidentitytheft.com/info/]": "Provides a clear call to action with a legitimate link to access resources."}

author: llm
saliency_strings: {"From: Jonathan Harker | Jobs.com <jonathan.harker@jobs.com>": "Identifies the sender as a legitimate company executive.", "Subject: URGENT: Action Required to Meet New Profile Compliance Standards": "Indicates an important update requiring action regarding compliance.", "download the attached compliance guide today to review these official enhancements.": "Explicit instruction to download a document for review.", "Download the Compliance Guide [-> https://jobs.com/downloads/compliance-guide.pdf]": "Provides a direct and legitimate link to download the compliance guide, which is a file."}
